categories.name: Steps in Crafting a Gourd Instrument
What to Check When Picking a Gourd

fun_fact: Did you know the drone of a tanpura, sitar and veena — sounds that anchor Indian classical music — comes from a gourd? But climate change is shrinking and weakening these gourds. Excessive heat, unseasonal rain, pests and disease are damaging harvests, threatening a craft held together by specialised knowledge, fragile supply chains and deep emotional ties. Read more
